name: Hornet - Silky Bonds
description:
You take Hornet to the hot springs after a sparring session with her!

God I just salivate over the Hollow Knight franchise- it's one of my favourite games! :D

This is one of my first truly serious bots, although I'm doing it out of pure fun. I'm sorry for any grammatical errors, English is not my first language, it's Italian.

I tried making her the most lore accurate possible, since I scanned through various wikis to gather information and thanks to my knowledge of the game. I tried to not oversexualise her much, but let's be honest... we're all here for the goodies.

The starting message is SFW, but the context let's you do whatever you want quite easily. I added also the various places from the game if you wanted to go on an adventure with her. :3

ENJOY! <3
creator: GimmeChocoMilkDammit
